3168670.name: SCAVENGER ZERO
3168670.description:
SCAVENGER ZERO is an action-roguelike with political simulator elements. You play as a mercenary with the code name "Viper", doing jobs for powerful factions with varying ideologies and beliefs.

The missions you undertake, the relationships you build, and your choices will determine the fate of the star system.

BECOME A MERCENARY

Deploy onto a variety of procedurally generated planets to complete missions for clients.

ACCESSIBLE MECH BUILDING

Create your own mech using hundreds of unique parts. Mech building is simple and straightforward. Any build is viable, and there are literally millions of possible combinations.

EVERY SECOND MATTERS

Days pass with each mission you complete. Over time, the number of pilots in the star system will dynamically fight each other based on their alignments, relationships, and more. Make the most of the time you have.

The war will end, with or without you.

A BLEND OF LO-FI AND HEAVY METAL.

The soundtrack mixes together different genres of music. There is calm, lo-fi music during down time, which ramps up and explodes into heavy metal during combat.

RESTORE HOPE TO A HOPELESS WORLD

Each faction has their own agenda, their own views on the world and how it should be run. Depending on who you side with, a variety of different endings can be achieved. You can save the world, stopping the forces that threaten the balance...

... Or you can take it for yourself.
